ELICIT_CARD.title: Elicit
ELICIT_CARD.flavor: Let every coil discharge at once.
TRICK_MAGIC_CARD.title: Trick Magic
TRICK_MAGIC_CARD.description: Draw [blue]{Cards}[/blue] cards. Gain [blue]{BufferPower}[/blue] [gold]Buffer[/gold]. The next Attack you play is replayed [blue]{Replays}[/blue] time(s).
TRICK_MAGIC_CARD.flavor: The audience sees ribbons. The enemy sees the bill.
BLADE_WALTZ_CARD.title: Blade Waltz
BLADE_WALTZ_CARD.description: Deal {Damage:diff()} damage to random enemies [blue]{Hits}[/blue] times. Gain [blue]{IntangiblePower}[/blue] [gold]Intangible[/gold].
CATALYST_CARD.title: Catalyst
CATALYST_CARD.description: Set an enemy's Poison to [blue]{PoisonMultiplier}[/blue] times its current amount.
CATALYST_CARD.flavor: If the toxin is still breathing, it can still grow.
OCEAN_DRAGON_SOUL_CARD.title: Ocean Dragon Soul
OCEAN_DRAGON_SOUL_CARD.description: At the end of your turn, heal [blue]{Heal}[/blue] HP.
OCEAN_DRAGON_SOUL_CARD.flavor: The tide always remembers the way back.
INFERNAL_DRAGON_SOUL_CARD.title: Infernal Dragon Soul
INFERNAL_DRAGON_SOUL_CARD.description: The first Attack you play each turn applies [blue]{BurnPower}[/blue] [gold]Burn[/gold] to enemies.
INFERNAL_DRAGON_SOUL_CARD.flavor: The first strike lights the whole fight.
HEXTECH_DRAGON_SOUL_CARD.title: Hextech Dragon Soul
HEXTECH_DRAGON_SOUL_CARD.flavor: Lightning in the coil never sleeps.
MOUNTAIN_DRAGON_SOUL_CARD.title: Mountain Dragon Soul
MOUNTAIN_DRAGON_SOUL_CARD.description: At the start of your turn, gain [blue]{PlatingPower}[/blue] [gold]Plating[/gold].
CHEMTECH_DRAGON_SOUL_CARD.title: Chemtech Dragon Soul
CHEMTECH_DRAGON_SOUL_CARD.description: At the start of your turn, obtain [blue]{PotionCount}[/blue] random Potion.
CHEMTECH_DRAGON_SOUL_CARD.flavor: No one knows the answer before the cork pops.
CLOUD_DRAGON_SOUL_CARD.title: Cloud Dragon Soul
CLOUD_DRAGON_SOUL_CARD.flavor: The wind puts choices in your hand.
ALL_IN_CARD.title: All In
ALL_IN_CARD.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
Discard all non-Attack cards.
ALL_IN_CARD.flavor: Only the wager and the edge remain on the table.
WHITE_HOLE_CARD.title: White Hole
WHITE_HOLE_CARD.description:
Whenever you draw this, gain {Energy:energyIcons()}.
Draw {Cards} cards.
WHITE_HOLE_CARD.flavor: It does not swallow choices. It spits them back into your hand.
SEARING_ATTACK_CARD.title: Searing Attack
SEARING_ATTACK_CARD.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
Can be upgraded any number of times.
OSTY_WISH_CARD.title: Osty's Wish
OSTY_WISH_CARD.description:
Gain {WishBlock} Block.
Deal {WishDamage} damage to all enemies.
OSTY_WISH_CARD.hoverTip: [blue]0[/blue]-cost Skill. Gain [blue]X[/blue] Block and deal [blue]X[/blue] damage to all enemies. [blue]X[/blue] is Osty's Max HP when it died. Exhaust. Upgraded copies retain.
OSTY_WISH_CARD.flavor: This time, Osty leaves the ending in your hands.
REPROGRAM_CARD.title: Reprogram
REPROGRAM_CARD.flavor: Delete a little stability. Gain a little force and finesse.
MIKAELS_BLESSING_CARD.title: Mikael's Blessing
MIKAELS_BLESSING_CARD.description: Heal [blue]{HealPercent}%[/blue] of your Max HP. Remove all debuffs from all players.
MIKAELS_BLESSING_CARD.flavor: After the storm, the bell still rings clear.
survivorUpgradeRune.selectionScreenPromp: Choose any number of cards to discard.
SURVIVOR_UPGRADE_RUNE.selectionScreenPro: Choose any number of cards to discard.
colorDiscoveryRune.selectionScreenPrompt: Choose 1 card to add to your hand.
COLOR_DISCOVERY_RUNE.selectionScreenProm: Choose 1 card to add to your hand.
FEEL_THE_BURN_CARD.title: Feel the Burn
FEEL_THE_BURN_CARD.description:
Remove all buffs from all enemies.
Apply [blue]{HextechBurnPower}[/blue] [gold]Burn[/gold] to them.
FEEL_THE_BURN_CARD.flavor: Snuff out their fire, then light your own.
OK_BOOMERANG_CARD.title: OK Boomerang
OK_BOOMERANG_CARD.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage to ALL enemies [blue]{Hits}[/blue] times.
Return this card to your hand.
OK_BOOMERANG_CARD.flavor: It leaves like a joke and returns like a debt collector.
